name_cn:
Blue tiger, Medium
DIOR book tote 24 new version
The Jouy print Zoo series is here!
I have to say, Dior really knows how to play
A tote bag you can carry! Simply amazing
A new hit derived from the most classic tote
More and more people love carrying large bags; truly unisex
Whether handheld or crossbody, commuting, gym, or business trips are no problem
Overall structured and won't collapse, I wish I could wear it every day
Large bag lovers can buy with confidence!!
36×16×27cm,
